Steps.Description: Use Trick, then switch to Chandelure 4x Calm Mind + X.Speed Use Shadow Ball vs. Hariyama
if opponent switches out into Hariyama while you set up vs. Togekiss, switch to the second Metagross and use Trick. Switch to Chandelure 4x Calm Mind + X.Speed Use Shadow Ball
if opponent switches into Lapras, switch to Poliwrath Belly Drum + X.Speed
